thig5.8:2.4: I cut off my hair & ordained.
thig5.8:3.1: Having purified the divine eye while still a trainee,
thig5.8:3.4: where I lived in the past.
thig5.8:4.3: I gain the liberation of immediacy—
thig5.8:5.2: stand like a tree with its root cut through.
thig5.8:5.3: I spit on wretched birth old age.
thig5.8:5.4: There is now no further becoming.
